subject: VOTE: 2017 Membership Card Design
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to vote for the card for 2017 Membership. |

Friend,

Our team has come up with two designs for our 2017 Inaugural Membership Card --__and we want you to have the final say.__

The card with the most votes will be used for our official membership rollout beginning on President-Elect Donald Trump's Inauguration Day. But hurry -- you only have until Monday to vote before our 2017 cards are sent to the printer.

VOTE for our Official 2017 Inaugural Membership Card below.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba2LdBAFUUpCF~WgaXB5DRMN6aaaaBODvBMEYH49a?o=8@w907v&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=k&r=&x=v8v6vA4zl0gv4ohgomoxUr4sYsVEWglj4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z) [**VOTE for Option 1 >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba2LdBAFUUpCF~WgaXB5DRMN6aaaaBODvBMEYH49a?o=8@w907v&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=j&r=&x=v8v6vA4zl0gv4ohgomoxUr4sYsVEWglj4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba2LdBAFUUpCF~WgaXB5DRMN6aaaaBODvBMEYH49a?o=8@w907v&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=i&r=&x=v8v6vA4zl0gv4ohgomoxUr4sYsVEWglj4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z) [**VOTE for Option 2 >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba2LdBAFUUpCF~WgaXB5DRMN6aaaaBODvBMEYH49a?o=8@w907v&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=h&r=&x=v8v6vA4zl0gv4ohgomoxUr4sYsVEWglj4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z)

Thank you,

Brad Parscale
Digital Director
Donald Trump for President

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/edgba2LdBAFUUpCF~WgaXB5DRMN6aaaaBODvBMEYH49a?o=8@w907v&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=n&r=) Or unsubscribe by [email](mailto:unsubscribe@gop.com?Subject=Unsubscribe%20dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

The card with the most votes will be used for our official membership rollout beginning on President-Elect Donald Trump's Inauguration Day. But hurry -- you only have until Monday to vote before our 2017 cards are sent to the printer. VOTE for our Official 2017 Inaugural Membership Card below. Thank you, Brad Parscale Digital Director Donald Trump for President Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Official Democratic Store
subject: 🎁 For the special Democrat in your life… 🎁
body:
Shop the Official Democratic Store The Democratic Party**Shop the Official Democratic Store for all of your holiday needs! Use HOLIDAYS2016 at checkout to take 15% off your order:

**[HAPPY SHOPPING](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e078718/120769144/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Last-Chance-Holiday-Shopping1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+HAPPY+SHOPPING&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f")****

**[http://my.democrats.org/Last-Chance-Holiday-Shopping](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e078723/120769144/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Last-Chance-Holiday-Shopping1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+httpmydemocratsorgLastChanceHolidayShopp&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f")**

\--------
Promotion valid until 11:59 p.m. ET on Monday, December 12th, 2016 at the Official Democratic Store.

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e078720/120769144/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e078721/120769144/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e07872e/120769144/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3fe/4067b0a/220ebce24/7e07872f/120769144/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161210_dnc_f&source=em_20161210_dnc_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
